<!-- Thanks for contributing to the PARAM Rudra user manual! -->

## What does this change?

<!-- Briefly describe the change and why it is needed. -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Correction (fixes wrong/outdated information)
- [ ] New content (adds a page or section)
- [ ] Formatting / styling
- [ ] Other (describe below)

## Checklist

- [ ] I verified any commands / paths / values against the live PARAM Rudra system or the official C-DAC manual.
- [ ] Internal links and page anchors still resolve.
- [ ] **No secrets** (passwords, SSH private keys, access tokens) are included.
- [ ] The docs still build (`mkdocs build`) locally, or I trust CI to verify.

<!--
Note: direct pushes to `main` are disabled. All changes land through a reviewed
pull request. A maintainer will review and merge.
-->
